Notice Of Motion And Motion Of Deft To Transfer Venue To Nevada County Superior Court;
Off Calendar Mar-13-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT DANIEL GOLDSMITH, M.D.'s Motion Of Defendant To Transfer Venue To Nevada County Superior Court is Granted. No opposition filed. The case is transferred to Nevada County pursuant to Civil Procedure Code section 397. Costs and fees of transfer shall be paid by defendant Daniel L. Goldsmith, M.D., per the stipulation of the parties. The Court signed the order that was emailed to the court. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
